meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-16 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c4d: +6 vs previous night · level with avg (38)
en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: The shortest night of the window turned out to be the best one. A late 23:33 bedtime — two hours later than Tuesday's — capped sleep at 6h53, 54 minutes under the 7-day average (7h 47m), yet the score climbed to 83 and the architecture was the strongest of the seven: deep sleep hit a window-high 96 minutes, REM 88, and awake time collapsed to 4 minutes. Almost nothing was wasted in bed. The autonomics agree: HRV rebounded to 38 (+6 vs the previous night, back level with the 38 average), RHR eased to 55 (−2), and morning stress is the window's lowest at 21 — a clean reversal of yesterday's HRV 32 / RHR 57 dip. Wednesday's planned swim intervals didn't happen (95 active kcal, no session logged), and that unplanned rest is the most likely reason the markers reset. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Wed 15 (Wednesday–Thursday). Readiness is good at 77. Squat is on today — the recovery markers back it, so take the session as planned; the only caution is the hours, not the state. If the day allows, pull bedtime back toward 22:30 tonight.

hr.c3d: −2 vs jučer (57) · u razini s 7-dnevnim prosjekom (55)
hr.c4d: +6 vs prethodna noć · u razini s prosjekom (38)
hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Najkraća noć u prozoru ispala je najbolja. Kasno lijeganje u 23:33 — dva sata kasnije nego u utorak — ograničilo je san na 6h53, 54 minute ispod 7-dnevnog prosjeka (7h 47m), a ocjena je ipak porasla na 83 uz najbolju strukturu među sedam noći: duboki san dosegnuo je vrhunac prozora od 96 minuta, REM 88, a budnost je pala na samo 4 minute. Gotovo ništa nije protraćeno u krevetu. Autonomika se slaže: HRV se oporavio na 38 (+6 vs prethodna noć, natrag u razini s prosjekom od 38), RHR je pao na 55 (−2), a jutarnji stres najniži je u prozoru — 21. To je čist obrat jučerašnjeg pada (HRV 32 / RHR 57). Srijedini planirani bazenski intervali nisu se dogodili (95 aktivnih kcal, nema zabilježenog treninga) i taj neplanirani odmor najvjerojatniji je razlog zašto su se pokazatelji resetirali. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Sri 15 (srijeda–četvrtak). Spremnost je dobra — 77. Čučanj je danas na rasporedu: pokazatelji oporavka ga podupiru, pa odradi trening po planu; jedini oprez su sati, ne stanje. Ako dan dopusti, večeras vrati lijeganje prema 22:30.
